headlines.description: Aston Villa ended their 30-year wait for a trophy as they strolled to an emphatic 3-0 victory over SC Freiburg in the Europa League final in Istanbul.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa cruise past Freiburg to win Europa League

keyEvents.text: Philipp Treu (SC Freiburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Emiliano Buendía (Aston Villa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Matty Cash (Aston Villa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! SC Freiburg 0, Aston Villa 1. Youri Tielemans (Aston Villa) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Morgan Rogers following a corner.
Goal! SC Freiburg 0, Aston Villa 2. Emiliano Buendía (Aston Villa) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by John McGinn following a corner.
First Half ends, SC Freiburg 0, Aston Villa 2.
Goal! SC Freiburg 0, Aston Villa 3. Morgan Rogers (Aston Villa) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Emiliano Buendía with a cross.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Max Rosenfelder replaces Philipp Lienhart.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Lucas Höler replaces Nicolas Höfler.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Amadou Onana replaces Victor Lindelöf.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Derry Scherhant replaces Vincenzo Grifo.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Jordy Makengo replaces Lukas Kübler.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Ian Maatsen replaces Lucas Digne.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Jadon Sancho replaces Emiliano Buendía.
John McGinn (Aston Villa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Christian Günter replaces Niklas Beste.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Tyrone Mings replaces Pau Torres.
Substitution, Aston Villa. Douglas Luiz replaces Youri Tielemans.
